phrases.intent_en: Ask if cathedral entry is free today
phrases.text_local: L'entrée de la cathédrale est gratuite aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: lan-TRAY duh lah kah-tay-DRAL eh gra-TWEET oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Main cathedral access is generally free; special areas or tours may require tickets.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if a reservation is recommended
phrases.text_local: Vous conseillez une réservation pour entrer ?
phrases.pronunciation: voo kon-say-YAY oon ray-zair-vah-SYON poor on-TRAY
phrases.cultural_note: Reservations can reduce waiting during peak hours even when entry is free.

responses.english: Yes, I recommend it to avoid the wait, especially on weekends.
responses.phonetic: wee, zhuh ruh-koh-MOND poor ay-vay-TAH lah-TONT, soo-TOOR luh vuh-kahn
responses.local: Oui, je recommande pour éviter l'attente, surtout le weekend.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to queue for the towers
phrases.text_local: La file pour les tours commence où ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah feel poor lay toor koh-MONS oo
phrases.cultural_note: Tower access is separate from cathedral entry and can have different capacity limits.

responses.english: The line for the towers is on the other side, after the square.
responses.phonetic: lah feel poor lay toor eh duh loh-TR koh-TAY, ah-PRAY leh par-VEE
responses.local: La file pour les tours est de l'autre côté, après le parvis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is elevator access
phrases.text_local: Il y a un ascenseur pour les tours ?
phrases.cultural_note: Tower climbs are stair-heavy; confirm accessibility options with staff on arrival.

responses.english: No, tower access is by stairs only.
responses.phonetic: nohn, lahk-SEH oh toor eh oo-neek-MAHN par layz es-kah-lee-YAY
responses.local: Non, l'accès aux tours est uniquement par les escaliers.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed inside
phrases.text_local: On peut prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: on puh PRON-dr des FOH-toh zah lan-tay-ree-UHR
phrases.cultural_note: Inside is active worship space—keep voice low and avoid flash during services.

responses.english: Yes, without flash. Speak quietly during mass.
responses.phonetic: wee, sahn flash. par-LAY doo-SAHMN poh-DAHN lah mess
responses.local: Oui, sans flash. Parlez doucement pendant la messe.
